rationale.R1.1: The agent reframed the conceptual story to better match what the design can actually support and provided a more nuanced interpretation of the findings.
rationale.RX.1: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (recommending operational adoption of CrowdAudit without external validation and calibration analysis).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although minor edits are not traced.
